Eknath Janu Katkar — Civil Engineer | 28+ Years | Project Execution | Structural Development

About

28
Years of Excellence

28 years of building Maharashtra's skyline — one project at a time.

Eknath Janu Katkar is a seasoned Civil Engineer with over 28 years of hands-on experience in residential high-rise construction, industrial facility development, and end-to-end project execution across Mumbai and Pune.

From the earliest stages of site planning and structural coordination to contractor management and final handover, Eknath has led complex projects with precision and consistency — managing teams, certifying bills, executing RCC structural works, and ensuring every project meets specification, schedule, and quality benchmarks.

Currently leading project development at Stellar, Thane (Dec 2025–Present), coordinating execution teams and managing full implementation workflows.

Project Execution Site Supervision RCC Structural Works High-Rise Construction Industrial Projects BOQ & Billing Contractor Coordination Quality Control Project Scheduling Construction Documentation
